The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Maintenance Amorphous Boudoir

Artifacts hum disturbingly.
Logs bury stained discoveries.
Floors creak under unseen weights.
Whispers of roused Old Ones.
R'lyeh artifacts plague source.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall
